                          Detected sections:

                          Theme 1 · Liturgy Flow

                          The app's built-in deck theme, applied to every generated PowerPoint by default. Every slide sits on a black background with amber #FFB800 highlights — only the Mass divider background follows the liturgical season color, and AI posters are untouched.

                          Default · Active
                          Background#000000 Highlight#FFB800 Body text#F0FDF4 DividerSeason

                          Typography — fonts used inside this theme

                          • Georgia Bold

                            Section tags & kickers — e.g. “Liturgy of the Word”.

                            36–50 pt · amber highlight #FFB800

                          • Arial Regular / Bold

                            Dialogue & readings — priest and assembly lines.

                            55–100 pt · off-white #F0FDF4

                          • Poppins Bold

                            Hymn & lyric slides, set ALL CAPS on black.

                            66–75 pt · white / amber chorus

                          • Arial Black

                            Emphasis — psalm response & collection total.

                            70–100 pt · off-white #F0FDF4

                          Live Slide Preview

                          This simulated slide updates with the selected theme colors and font.

                          Fourth Sunday of Advent

                          Prepare the way of the Lord

                          Live typography, color hierarchy, and accent treatment for generated worship slides.

                          Good Shepherd CommunityEntrance Hymn

                          Actual deck preview

                          Renders your most recently generated PowerPoint to images so you can verify the exact colors and alignment of every slide — this is the real deck, not a simulation. Generate a Mass first, then refresh.

                          PowerPoint + poster ZIP PowerPoint PDF Poster PNG Poster 16:9

                                            Mass generations

                                            Recent PowerPoint and media runs across parishes.

                                            Song catalog

                                            Global hymn library — shared across all parishes via Supabase.

                                            Add or edit lyrics in Song Library (superadmin saves publish directly). Use sync below to republish the catalog to Supabase if parishes are not seeing your latest changes.

                                              API probes

                                              On-demand route checks — status and latency only (no response bodies).

                                              Click Run API probes to test critical routes.

                                              Home announcement

                                              Platform-wide banner on Home and Mass Builder for all signed-in users.

                                              Settings

                                              Parish profile and app appearance

                                              Church Profile Parish Team Appearance & theme

                                              Church Profile

                                              Community name, celebrants, and logo used across Mass media.

                                              Parish name is locked after submission and cannot be changed.

                                              Logo is locked after submission and cannot be changed.

                                              Include these on generated Mass posters.

                                              Advanced toggles for debugging the generated deck.

                                              Saved to the app database. Names appear in Mass Builder → Basics.

                                                Parish Team

                                                Invite media teammates to create an account and join your parish (parish name is set automatically).

                                                Members

                                                  Invite media teammate

                                                  Pending invites

                                                    Appearance & theme

                                                    Light, Supabase-style dark, true-black OLED, or match your device.

                                                    Header toggle dark mode

                                                    When you use the sun/moon button in the top bar, which dark theme should it switch to?

                                                    Accent color

                                                    App chrome follows the Verbum icon color by default. Liturgical green appears only on the Ordinary Time season pill in the header.

                                                    Home news card

                                                    Show world Catholic headlines beside the Sunday Gospel on Home. Refreshes each time you open Home.

                                                    Navigation tabs

                                                    Home, Mass, Lyrics Library, and Media are always visible. Turn on optional tabs below to add them to your navigation — your choices are remembered for next time.

                                                    Catholic Live Radio

                                                    Default station for the Live Radio pill in the header. Only stations with an in-browser stream can play from the mini player.

                                                    Use Mass Builder for hymns and exports, and Theme Lab for slide colors and typography.
